page_content: PSYC391 Community Interventions: Domestic Violence II - Service Learning (3 Credits) Apply knowledge gained in PSYC318D/PSYC318 to provide interventions to individuals who have experienced domestic violence. Critical analysis of interventions and related research. Ethical and cultural considerations in the provision of services are addressed. Prerequisite: PSYC381 or PSYC318D. Restriction: Preference given to majors in Psychology; Women, Gender, and Sexuality Studies; and Human Development; and permission of BSOS-Psychology department. Credit Only Granted for: PSYC319D or PSYC391. Formerly: PSYC319D.
